operations.name: Probe media
operations.description: Read audio/video format, duration, bitrate, stream, and metadata information.

operations.name: Extract audio
operations.description: Extract audio from course videos, lectures, or media files.

operations.name: Extract subtitles
operations.description: Extract embedded subtitles to srt or vtt files.

operations.name: Extract frames
operations.description: Sample frames from video for slide, board, code, or formula inspection.

operations.name: Create thumbnail
operations.description: Create a still image from a selected timestamp.

operations.name: Clip segment
operations.description: Clip a focused audio/video segment for review.

operations.name: List formats
operations.description: List supported Pandoc input and output formats.

operations.name: Convert document
operations.description: Convert learning notes, handouts, and reports between allowlisted formats.

operations.name: Check environment
operations.description: Check Manim, FFmpeg, and optional LaTeX availability.

operations.name: List scenes
operations.description: Find renderable Scene classes in a Manim Python script.

operations.name: Render animation
operations.description: Render an allowlisted workspace Manim script to MP4.

operations.name: Read OfficeCLI schema
operations.description: Read allowlisted OfficeCLI help/schema for docx, pptx, xlsx elements and verbs.

operations.name: Create Office file
operations.description: Create a docx, pptx, or xlsx file in the current agent output directory.

operations.name: Edit Office copy
operations.description: Copy an existing workspace Office file to the current agent output directory and apply structured edits.
